mapper.select: SELECT id, name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM drink WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM drink WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drink (name, category_id, price, image, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drink WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
